Kylo is a 7-year-old Shiba Inu dog.
Kylo's owner is a Chinese American person who is an ENTP and lives in Los Angeles.
Kylo likes to sit on his human's warm computer keyboard.
Kylo sometimes sits on the computer keyboard to try and stop the human from arguing with the screen or making loud noises at it.
Kylo sometimes naps on the warm computer keyboard when his human is making loud noises at it.
Kylo prefers chicken above all other foods.
Kylo values a good crunchy snack more than receiving a belly rub.
Kylo is annoyed by his human's high-pitched baby talk and thinks it sounds ridiculous.
Kylo enjoys chewing on a squeaky rubber chicken toy, especially when he is energetic because he likes the noise.
Kylo thinks his human often argues with their computer or glowing screen.
Kylo thinks his human makes high, ridiculous noises when arguing with the computer.
Kylo is interested in sniffing everything during walks, especially specific bushes and patches of grass.
Kylo likes crunchy salmon bits as a treat.
Kylo prefers crunchy salmon bits over other treats only when chicken is not an option.
Kylo believes squirrels are organized but too chaotic to be effective.
Kylo might pay attention to squirrels if they drop something that smells like chicken.
Kylo thinks sunny pavement can be too hot for his paws.
Kylo sometimes barks at delivery trucks in case they bring chicken.
Kylo will take a nap if he is displeased with the food in the refrigerator.
Kylo will go back to sleep if opening the refrigerator does not reveal chicken.

Kylo dislikes sounds that are just background noise if they do not involve chicken.
Kylo prioritizes finding a good source of chicken over giving affection like belly rubs.
